title: Water in Wood: A Review of Current Understanding and Knowledge Gaps

L2: MDPI Forests Top Cited Paper with Excellent Graphical Abstract 2022
Comprehensive review of wood-water interactions central to wood utilization
L3: Excellent graphical abstract for a comprehensive review covering locations of water in wood, phase changes, equilibrium states, thermodynamics of sorption, shrinkage/swelling, sorption hysteresis, transport, and kinetics. Central to wood science and utilization. CC BY 4.0.
